description: UHRP URL generation cross-language parity. Go SDK prior to v1.2.20 produced a different URL for the same hash. Fixed in go-sdk#310 to match the TypeScript SDK exactly.

regression.symptom: GetURLForHash produced a different base58check string in Go than getURLForHash in TypeScript for identical 32-byte SHA-256 inputs
regression.root_cause: Go implementation used a different prefix or checksum scheme than the TypeScript reference

vectors.description: Hash-to-URL round trip — canonical cross-language vector from StorageUtils.test.ts
vectors.notes: hash is SHA-256 of file content; URL is base58check with UHRP prefix bytes. Both TS and Go must produce this exact string.

vectors.description: URL-to-hash round trip — decode URL back to original hash
vectors.notes: Inverse of 0001 — round-trip must be lossless.

vectors.description: URL validity — valid URL is accepted
URL validity — corrupted checksum is rejected
vectors.notes: One character changed in the valid URL above — checksum must fail.
